implementation_summary: Added 'proposed' flag support to base:adr skill: updated argument-hint, added proposed argument to Step 3 parse block, added Status conditional to Step 4 substitution list, updated 'No automatic acceptance' note. Updated ADR-template.md Status line with inline comment documenting Proposed as a valid alternative. Completed the promote_to_adr application rule in project-curator.md, replacing the S4 placeholder with the full rule requiring the 'proposed' flag in autonomous invocations. All S1 changes verified intact.

test_counts.note: Markdown-only changes; no executable test suite applicable
